message:

@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cilium-22157-cfp-upload-helm-charts-to-oci-registry-and-sign-them-with-cosign",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cilium: CFP:  upload Helm charts to OCI registry and sign them with cosign",
+    "description": "CFP:  upload Helm charts to OCI registry and sign them with cosign. Requested by 20+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cilium deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your cilium version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium\nhelm list -n cilium 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working cilium installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cilium configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cilium configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium\nkubectl get configmap -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cilium\n```\n## Cilium Feature Proposal\n\nWith Helm v3.8.0, the OCI support became [GA](https://helm.sh/docs/topics/registries), which is an excellent chance to start publishing Helm charts to OCI-compliant registries."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for CFP:  upload Helm charts to OCI registry and sign them with…",
+        "description": "Hey  feel free to submit a PR that implements this proposal. The charts are currently stored in https://github.com/cilium/charts and the script to prepare them is in https://github.com/cilium/charts/blob/master/prepare_artifacts.sh.\n\nAt the moment we are not planning to upload the helm charts to any other locations besides https://github.com/cilium/charts. /\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium\nkubectl get events -n cilium --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"CFP:  upload Helm charts to OCI registry and sign them with…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hey  feel free to submit a PR that implements this proposal. The charts are currently stored in https://github.com/cilium/charts and the script to prepare them is in https://github.com/cilium/charts/blob/master/prepare_artifacts.sh.\n\nAt the moment we are not planning to upload the helm charts to any other locations besides https://github.com/cilium/charts. /",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "cilium",
+      "graduated",
+      "networking",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "cilium"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/cilium/cilium/issues/22157",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/cilium/cilium"
+    },
+    "reactions": 20,
+    "comments": 15,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with cilium installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:39:00.450Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cilium-22157-cfp-upload-helm-charts-to-oci-registry-and-sign-them-with-cosign",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cilium: CFP:  upload Helm charts to OCI registry and sign them with cosign",
+    "description": "CFP:  upload Helm charts to OCI registry and sign them with cosign. Requested by 20+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cilium deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your cilium version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium\nhelm list -n cilium 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working cilium installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cilium configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cilium configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium\nkubectl get configmap -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cilium\n```\n## Cilium Feature Proposal\n\nWith Helm v3.8.0, the OCI support became [GA](https://helm.sh/docs/topics/registries), which is an excellent chance to start publishing Helm charts to OCI-compliant registries."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for CFP:  upload Helm charts to OCI registry and sign them with…",
+        "description": "Hi all,\n\nSubmitting this PR to have the Cilium Helm chart pushed to Quay.io as an OCI artifact.\nThe chart is then signed using Cosign (same process as for container images).\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium\nkubectl get events -n cilium --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"CFP:  upload Helm charts to OCI registry and sign them with…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hi all,\n\nSubmitting this PR to have the Cilium Helm chart pushed to Quay.io as an OCI artifact.\nThe chart is then signed using Cosign (same process as for container images).",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
